title: mypy: 16 arg-type errors in schc/headers.py and interface/handler.py
description:
16 arg-type errors where int|None passed to functions expecting int:
- src/lichen/schc/headers.py: lines 81-83 (IPv6Header constructor), 159 (UdpDatagram), 261-267, 298-301, 350-358
- src/lichen/interface/handler.py: lines 93, 113, 127, 197, 209
- src/lichen/rpl/dao.py: line 190

Fix: Add None checks before passing values, or update type hints if None is actually valid.
